en: Apin, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Langui , are you home?

ab: Uka a Langui lumaq, Savi cak, ma’aq qa sinkuzakuza nah? na takuaq’ ku ka Langui.
ch: B:Langui不在家耶!我是Savi，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Langui。
en: Langui is not at home. I am Savi. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: Qodacno’az, sani cak cin Abu, kangzin cam matua ki hilav!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Sani和 Abu，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Sani and Abu, please open the door for us.
Who is it?
I am Laung, I am here for Tiang.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Delmudin casu uka munidi, miliskin sala cak su.
ch: B:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Umav, munidi cak kilim su paqaqenan.
en: Umav , I am here to play with you.

ab: Kavain munkunbu lumaq, delmudin cak mal’u su nah.
ch: B:快進來家裡，我等你好久。
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Inak naipi sincuaz tu hutan, tanami ma’un!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Un, madavc sa hutan di konun.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Hanuin, inak nganki sincucuaz tu kut’aqon, tanami ma’un.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Malungku! Inak nepi sincuaz tu tipul, uka makuca helu, tanami ma’un!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Ua! Tututza tu madavc sala za tipul li.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: Nicak maqatu ma’un ni izuk, mang’un cak cia bunbun na konun.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃香蕉就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.
Let me peel the papaya for you.

ab: Miqomicang, madeia cia salitung di ka vuc.
en: Thank you. This papaya is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: Pidei ma’un, madeia nak ka sinhanat sanglav.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Uu! Tuza tu mahancum macihal amin konun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Laqatuanin cak, ni cak maqatu ukonan i.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
